title: pungent and tender norwegian chive hash
description: energizing breakfast dish featuring chopped chive, coconut-cream-crack, paleo-friendly.
instructions: crack eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a pinch of salt and pepper.
chop the chives and garlic and saut in coconut oil until fragrant.
add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
crumble the bacon and add it to the pan along with the coconut flakes.
stir to combine and cook for an additional minute.
pour the coconut cream into the pan and stir to combine with the other ingredients.
reduce heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes or until the mixture has thickened slightly.
garnish with additional chives if desired.
